Node.help: Describes a host as to be defined in hosts file

PropertyString.name: hostIP
PropertyString.regexDescription: It is not a correct Ip address.
PropertyString.description: The IP associated with the host name

PropertyString.name: hostName
PropertyString.regexDescription: Must contain letters, numbers, '-' and '.' only. May not be empty. Does not conform to RFC1035 definition.

PropertyString.name: alias1
PropertyString.regexDescription: Must contain letters, numbers, '-' and '.' only. Does not conform to RFC1035 definition.
PropertyString.help: Aliases provide for name changes, alternate spellings, shorter hostnames, or generic hostnames (for example, localhost)

PropertyString.name: alias2
PropertyString.regexDescription: Must contain letters, numbers, '-' and '.' only. Does not conform to RFC1035 definition.
PropertyString.help: Aliases provide for name changes, alternate spellings, shorter hostnames, or generic hostnames (for example, localhost)
